title: No convention governs npm publish-unit / package topology
description: No convention governs npm publish-unit / package topology (which package hosts the bin). DEC-0013 (bin ships as its own publish unit) was decided in this domain without a governing convention.

evidence.reference: conventions block has no rule covering packaging/publish topology

proposed_resolution: Author a convention governing publish-unit / package topology; re-point DEC-0013 to item_governed_by_convention; close this gap.
